_doc: Immutable reviewed route-anchor decisions for the route-identity-dispositions-v1 migration. Every non-projectable disposition is evidence-linked and sets study_projectable=false. The pinned GTFS absence is classification context, never proof of a fabricated alias.

sbs_plus_successor_rule.description: Only when a canonical route has no exact GTFS id/short-name match, bind its source-literal route_id to the sole current terminal-+ GTFS id that becomes identical after removing only +. Do not strip Local/LTD/E, split branch labels, punctuation, or arbitrary SBS text.

BX6.reason: Official evidence identifies Bx6 Local and Bx6 SBS as service variants under the current BX6 GTFS route; retain the existing SBS anchor and add the local record as a reviewed variant.

Q48.reason: Official Queens redesign evidence proves that the current Q48 is the Glen Oaks service; the separately disposed LaGuardia record is historical number reuse.

route_15-express-bus-battery-pl.reason: Source evidence uses "15 Express bus routes" as an aggregate label spanning multiple services; it cannot identify one current GTFS route.

route_34th-st-sbs.reason: Official route-index evidence names a 34th Street SBS corridor/service label but supplies no single GTFS route id; the label must not compete with M34+ or M34A+.

route_5-subway-flatbush.reason: Source evidence identifies 5 Subway as subway, outside the MTA bus GTFS route class.
